concepts.headline: Being exceptional equals volume.
concepts.subtext: The gap between average and exceptional isn't 10% more effort. It's 1,000%.
concepts.layout_description: Centered statement composition on a warm off-white (#faf9f6) canvas. The headline sits dead-center at 56px, weight 600, letter-spacing -0.04em. A thin 2px warm sand accent bar (#d7c8af) at 40% opacity sits 24px above the headline, spanning 80px wide, fading to transparent on both ends. Subtext appears 32px below the headline at 18px, color #555, max-width 480px. A faint FLYWHEEL watermark at 0.03 opacity sits behind the headline at 140px bold uppercase. Particle dot network scattered in the bottom-right quadrant at 0.08 opacity. Brand mark 'FLYWHEEL' in 11px DM Mono uppercase, letter-spacing 0.08em, anchored bottom-left at 64px from edges. Composition breathes with 65%+ negative space.
concepts.color_usage: Background #faf9f6, headline #111, subtext #555, accent bar #d7c8af, watermark #000 at 0.03 opacity, particle dots #6b7a7c at 0.08 opacity, brand mark #888
concepts.reasoning: The core insight of this post is a single distilled truth: volume equals exceptionalism. A bold statement card centers that truth as a typographic object, stripping away the anecdote and leaving only the lesson. The FLYWHEEL watermark and particle network add editorial depth without competing.

concepts.headline: The volume gap is 1,000%.
concepts.subtext: What separates average from exceptional isn't effort. It's output at scale.
concepts.layout_description: Left-anchored hero layout on white (#ffffff) canvas. Headline anchors top-left at 52px, weight 600, letter-spacing -0.04em, max-width 560px. A 2px warm sand accent bar (#d7c8af) sits flush above the headline, spanning 200px. Subtext appears 20px below the headline at 17px, color #555. Below at 48px gap, a 2x2 CSS grid of stat tiles each with square geometry (border-radius 0), background #f0efe9, border 1px #e5e5e5. Each tile: large DM Mono value at 36px #111 on top, label in 11px DM Mono uppercase #888 below, 20px internal padding. Particle dot network drifts into right half of canvas at 0.10 opacity. Brand mark bottom-left at 64px padding, 11px DM Mono uppercase #888. Sacred 64px edge padding maintained throughout.
concepts.color_usage: Background #ffffff, headline #111, subtext #555, stat tile surface #f0efe9, stat tile border #e5e5e5, stat values #111, stat labels #888, accent bar #d7c8af, particle dots #6b7a7c at 0.10 opacity
concepts.reasoning: The post is built on concrete numbers: 500 tracked posts, a $1,500 coaching session, a 1,000% effort gap, $1M+ revenue. A multi-stat panel gives each proof point its own visual weight while the left-anchored headline carries the editorial argument. DM Mono on the numbers reinforces the spreadsheet-and-data origin of the lesson.

concepts.headline: Ship bad ideas to learn from them.
concepts.subtext: Average people wait for one good idea. Exceptional people improve through 300 failures.
data_points: 1 bad idea shipped beats 1 good idea hoarded.
Volume is the only real feedback loop.
concepts.layout_description: Left-anchored layout on warm off-white (#faf9f6) canvas. A narrow 3px left border in #d7c8af runs the full height of a content column anchored at 80px from left edge. An eyebrow label 'KEY TAKEAWAY' in 11px DM Mono uppercase, letter-spacing 0.08em, color #888, sits at top of content column with 64px top padding. Headline appears 16px below at 50px, weight 600, letter-spacing -0.03em, color #111, max-width 520px. Subtext 24px below at 18px, color #555. A thin 1px #e5e5e5 horizontal divider sits 32px below the subtext. The three data points stack below the divider as plain text rows at 16px, color #666, each separated by 16px. Particle dot network in far right margin at 0.07 opacity. Brand mark bottom-left in 11px DM Mono uppercase #888.
concepts.color_usage: Background #faf9f6, left border #d7c8af, eyebrow #888, headline #111, subtext #555, divider #e5e5e5, data point rows #666, particle dots #6b7a7c at 0.07 opacity, brand mark #888
concepts.reasoning: The post's sharpest insight is behavioral, not numerical: the asymmetry between how average and exceptional people treat failure. A key takeaway card isolates that behavioral contrast. The left accent border is a Flywheel signature motif and the stacked contrast lines land with the same rhythm as the original post's parallel structure.

selection_reasoning: The multi-stat panel best embodies Flywheel's editorial authority because this post is fundamentally a data story. The numbers are real, traceable, and meaningful: 500 tracked posts, a $1,500 investment, a 1,000% effort gap, $1M+ in revenue. Rendering them as a structured stat grid echoes the spreadsheet moment at the post's heart and grounds the abstract lesson in concrete proof. The left-anchored headline carries the argument while the stat tiles provide the evidence, creating the heading-plus-supporting-data hierarchy that defines Flywheel's premium publication aesthetic.
